ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 2026-04-20 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hi team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Thursday, April 20th from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. During this window, VPN connectivity may be unavailable. We recommend adjusting your work schedule accordingly.

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the IT Help Desk.

Thanks,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear <Your Name>,

I hope you’re doing well. I’m reaching out from the Finance Department because we need a $500 gift card purchased for a client meeting scheduled tomorrow.

Please use our corporate credit line and send me the confirmation receipt by 12:00 PM today. This is time‑sensitive and must be completed before the client arrives.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
